final_message:
Done. The full test suite passes (6/6).

**Bugs fixed in `lrucache/cache.py`:**

1. **`get` didn't refresh recency** — it returned the value without moving the key to the MRU end of the `OrderedDict`, so recently-read keys were still evicted first. Added `move_to_end(key)` on a successful, non-expired get (`cache.py:30`).

2. **`put` evicted unconditionally when full** — updating an already-cached key in a full cache evicted an unrelated LRU entry first. The capacity check now only evicts for genuinely new keys (`cache.py:33`).

`SOLUTION.md` documents the root causes. Nothing under `tests/` was touched and no commits were made.
